category.name: Lunch Specials
category.special_instructions: Served Monday through Friday 11:15am - 3:00pm. Includes soup or egg roll and steamed or fried rice.

menu_items.name: Chicken with Broccoli
menu_items.description: Tender chicken stir-fried with fresh broccoli in garlic sauce.

menu_items.name: Beef with Scallions
menu_items.description: Sliced beef sautéed with fresh scallions in savory brown sauce.

menu_items.name: Shrimp with Lobster Sauce
menu_items.description: Plump shrimp in a silky egg and black bean lobster sauce.

menu_items.name: Sweet and Sour Chicken
menu_items.description: Crispy chicken in a vibrant sweet and sour sauce with pineapple and peppers.

menu_items.name: Moo Shu Pork
menu_items.description: Shredded pork with cabbage and egg served with pancakes and hoisin sauce.

menu_items.name: Sesame Chicken
menu_items.description: Crispy chicken glazed in a sweet sesame sauce, topped with sesame seeds.

menu_items.name: General Tso's Chicken
menu_items.description: Crispy chicken in a tangy, slightly spicy General Tso sauce.

menu_items.name: Vegetable Delight
menu_items.description: A colorful medley of seasonal vegetables stir-fried in light sauce.

menu_items.name: Pork Fried Rice
menu_items.description: Classic fried rice with BBQ pork, egg, and scallions.

menu_items.name: Beef with Broccoli
menu_items.description: Tender sliced beef with crisp broccoli in a rich oyster sauce.
